subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Thee, O Thou King of eternity and Lord of the world, Who art manifest in Thy Greatest Name, inasmuch as Thou hast enabled me to hearken unto Thy verses
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز مقصود من فی الارض و السماء و مالک ملکوت الاسماء باین کلمات عالیات نطق
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
